statement.en: Multi-omic profiling of early pregnancy small and large plasma extracellular vesicles reveals placental, metabolic, and structural adaptation signatures
statement.summary: Supplementary tables and figures supporting the manuscript: "Multi-omic profiling of early pregnancy small and large plasma extracellular vesicles reveals placental, metabolic, and structural adaptation signatures"

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: This is a supplementary data/methods document for an empirical biological study (2026, recent preprint). The core claims are not yet peer-reviewed or validated in independent cohorts. Multi-omic biomarker discovery studies require replication; provisional status is appropriate.

ramanujanFormula.interpretation: 妊娠の秘密は、胎盤・代謝・構造の三つの力が時間とともに共鳴する場に宿る。

visualGlyph.interpretation: 三つの世界が中心へ集まり、新しい生命の核へと情報が流れ込む瞬間。
